scope: M29 Stuart sign-in support and Resend email OTP API settings

productionDiagnosis.finding: Stuart is active and not OTP locked. No LoginOtp rows exist for Stuart, so the user likely did not complete a successful code request with the exact account email. SMS delivery to the same phone is working for HOT alerts. Email fallback was not usable until Resend credentials were made configurable.

backend: AuthOtpService email OTP now reads resendApiKey and resendFromEmail from SystemSetting with env fallback.
SettingsController now whitelists resendApiKey and resendFromEmail.
resendApiKey is masked as a sensitive setting.
resendFromEmail is validated as an email address when non-empty.
frontend: Settings -> Integrations now includes Email Sign-in / Resend fields.
Login first screen now offers Send SMS code and Use email code instead after an email is entered.
Login footer copy now reflects phone or email code delivery.

validation.typeErrors: No errors found in changed files via VS Code diagnostics.
validation.focusedTests: server npm test -- --run tests/authOtpPolicy.test.ts tests/authDevModeLogin.test.ts: 2 files passed, 8 tests passed.
validation.build: npm run build passed: server tsc and client tsc/vite build.

steps: Opened login page in local Vite preview.
Confirmed Send SMS code is enabled.
Confirmed Use email code instead is enabled on the first screen.

remainingExternalDependency.resendApiKey: Client/admin must provide a production Resend Sending access API key.
remainingExternalDependency.resendFromEmail: Client/admin must provide a verified sender email/domain in Resend.
remainingExternalDependency.productionEmailSmoke: Must be run after Resend credentials are saved in Settings.
